name: ServiceMaster
message: ServiceMaster is a national company that has been a leader in the cleaning industry for more than 50 years. The local franchise in Minneapolis were founded in 1993 by people in the community who wanted to provide the best possible cleaning services to their neighbors. Since then, ServiceMaster of Minneapolis has grown to employee more than 70 people, and has encouraged a culture where your satisfaction comes first.The excellent service we are committed to providing has helped us continue to be leaders in the field of cleaning and disaster restoration for residential and commercial properties.When we come into your home or business, you can rest assured your possessions will be treated with the best care and the cleaning your property receives will be of the highest quality. We can help you get the job done – no matter how big or small, we do it all!
